THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LELIEVRE, CECILE EDELHAUSER, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BACA, LYDIA $3,106.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,156.00, PLAINTIFF MAY CASH THE CHECK PREVIOUSLY TENDERED BY DEFENDANT. IF THE CHECK IS HONORED BY THE BANK, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR THAT PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
